entities.name: Firebase
entities.context: Referenced as the architectural style for current non-relational data storage (employers, leads, users, stories)

entities.name: Roll-up warehouse
entities.context: Analytics infrastructure currently absent; would enable cross-collection insights like applicant completion rates

entities.name: Analytics dashboards
entities.context: Fully-automatic, always-fresh reporting system discussed as expensive at current scale due to read volume

entities.name: Ad-hoc per-employer reports
entities.context: Practical analytics approach manageable at current scale when driven by explicit requests and clear filters

entities.name: Employer scoping
entities.context: Design constraint principle for new analytics endpoints to control cost and prevent open-ended queries

relationships.context: Firebase-style structure lacks roll-up warehouse capabilities, requiring multiple cross-collection reads for analytics
Warehouse would enable cost-effective always-fresh dashboards across all employers
Ad-hoc reports presented as practical alternative to expensive fully-automatic dashboards
Scoping constraints make per-employer reports manageable and cost-controlled
